name: Dolly Parton
abstract: Dolly Rebecca Parton (born January 19, 1946) is an American singer, songwriter, actress, philanthropist, and businesswoman. After achieving success as a songwriter for other artists, Parton's debut album, Hello, I'm Dolly, was released in 1967, commencing a career spanning 60 years and 50 studio albums.

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Findley
about_quotes.evidence: Interviewer mentions: '...everybody from Dolly Parton to Tom Scott.' Interviewee does not respond with any personal anecdote or confirmation of a direct relationship with Dolly Parton.

about_quotes.speaker: Buckingham
about_quotes.evidence: But no, Dolly and I had a great chemistry. Still do. I mean we’re still great friends.

about_quotes.evidence: Dolly Parton’s “9 to 5” is like $110 every couple of years I guess sort of.
